title: gladiolus communis
intro: Gladiolus communis, also known as the wild gladiolus or bee orchid, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus communis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to menstrual issues.
